name: Fast Clicker
description: Auto-clicker utility by MurGaa.com — automates mouse clicking for games and repetitive tasks

download.note: No version in filename — must download and inspect

changelog.extraction: Look for 'What\'s new' or 'Version history' section on product page
changelog.note: No dedicated changelog page or structured feed

release_date.note: Last-Modified header on ZIP is the only date signal. As of 2026-06: Sat, 07 Sep 2024 09:29:51 GMT — hasn't been updated in years.

notes: Extremely basic distribution. No Sparkle, no API, no versioned URLs, no Mac App Store. Hosted on Amazon S3 via CloudFront. The only way to detect version is download+extract Info.plist. To avoid downloading every check, compare Last-Modified or Content-Length headers first.
